title: Lunar Optimized
description: Lunar Optimized is a lightweight performance modpack designed to maximize FPS, eliminate stutters, and reduce RAM usage for the perfect vanilla-plus experience.
body:
![LUNAR OPTIMIZED](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60eb552e342fbaddcc3fd41f430fac6650b85e38_0.webp)

# Introducing Lunar Optimized!

**Lunar Optimized** is a lightweight, plug-and-play Fabric modpack engineered to maximize performance, improve frame rates (FPS), and eliminate micro-stutters. It fixes native engine bottlenecks and optimizes resource allocation without degrading the classic vanilla look. Out of the box, it includes essential client-side features while remaining 100% safe for any server. No more fps drops and performance issues.

---

## Key Features & Enhancements

* **Graphics & Shaders:** Overhauls rendering for massive FPS gains, advanced video settings, and built-in shader support.
* **Smart Culling:** Stops rendering hidden blocks and entities behind walls, heavily reducing GPU load and lag spikes.
* **World Loading:** Multi-threads chunk management for faster world generation and stutter-free exploration.
* **Memory & Dynamic FPS:** Patches Java memory leaks to shrink RAM footprint and throttles FPS when the game is minimized.

---

## Works Anywhere

Lunar Optimized is **100% client-side**. It adds no custom blocks or items, making it completely safe to use on any singleplayer world, Minecraft Realm, or public multiplayer server.

---

## Installation & Support

* **Easy Setup:** Download the `.mrpack` file and import it into your preferred launcher.
* **Get Help:** Have questions or need setup assistance? Join our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/jBtNPxvGdq) for quick support!

<details>
<summary>📦 Mod List</summary>

* Sodium & Sodium Extras
* Reese's Sodium Options
* Lithium
* Entity Culling & More Culling
* ModernFix
* C2ME (Chunk Management)
